== Notes for [[Item:Q104400|Q104400]] ==

Ana de ALBORNOZ24 was born (date unknown).

Spouse: Esteban de SOSA. Ana de ALBORNOZ and Esteban de SOSA were married. Children were: Francisco de SOSA ALBORNOZ.

http://www.raullongoria.net/Genealogy/FamilyTree/b11.html#P6970

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000035552970044

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
